notes: Core ERP suite; 3-tier client-server architecture; TeamSAP designed to accelerate R/3 implementations; evolved to SAP ECC, then S/4HANA
Implementation methodology with Road Map, best practices, templates; predecessor to SAP Activate; still referenced in S/4HANA migration
Strategic product architecture; open interfaces for certified partner software; evolved into SAP NetWeaver and Business Technology Platform (BTP)
Online competency center for knowledge transfer; replaced by SAP Support Portal / SAP Community Network
Proactive system diagnostics program; still available as SAP EarlyWatch Alert in SAP for Me portal
Business modeling and R/3 configuration tool underlying ASAP; succeeded by SAP Solution Manager, then Cloud ALM
[post-publication] Next-generation ERP on in-memory HANA database; successor to R/3 and ECC; generally available 2015
